name: project-zenith
description: A real-time voice AI platform powered by LiveKit WebRTC and Pipecat media pipelines.

scripts.dev:redis: docker rm -f zenith-redis 2>/dev/null; CID=$(docker ps -q --filter publish=6379); [ -n "$CID" ] && docker stop $CID; sleep 1; docker run --rm --name zenith-redis -p 6379:6379 redis:7-alpine
scripts.dev: dotenv -- concurrently -k -c "red,cyan,magenta,yellow" -n "redis,next,fapi,ngrok" "npm run dev:redis" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "uv run --directory backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "ngrok http 8000 --domain=\$NGROK_DOMAIN --log=stdout"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && uv sync --directory backend
